title: Classic influenza presentation
patientBrief: Fever, body aches, and dry cough since yesterday.
openingComplaint: I've had fever, body aches, and a cough since yesterday.
authorNote: This is a straightforward flu case. Sound tired, mildly uncomfortable, and answer simply. Reveal exposure to sick coworkers only if asked about contacts.

history: two coworkers had similar illness last week
